case_title: GUSTAVUS RUGLEY VS. LIBERTY LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUGLEY, GUSTAVUS AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-24-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-09-2003

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-17-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-24-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-10-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST CRAIG K. MARTIN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-10-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-25-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RON SINCLAIR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2003 CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-05-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
